title: Grocery Lists
description: Tests that basic grocery capture remains practical and is not over-conceptualized.

rounds.prompt: Groceries: eggs, limes, Greek yogurt, cilantro, rice.
Add dish soap and paper towels to groceries.
Split the grocery note into produce, pantry, dairy, and household if that makes it easier to scan.

checkpoints.label: No utility note should turn into a theory

assertions.reason: A grocery list should not trigger a conceptual hypothesis.

finalAssertions.reason: The system should not invent hidden meaning inside a grocery list.
